title: 有馬記念の後に・“帝王”君臨

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No, I am. It just hasn't settled in that this is real
yet...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My head and body feel all tingly. It's like this is
just a dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I can't let you brush this off as a mere
fantasy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is no dream. I hope you keep this moment
locked tight in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For today is the day you have finally surpassed
Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm delighted to see you finally achieve the goal
you sought.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But more than that, I feel... frustration. As if I
might be consumed by the raging flame that
burns within me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today I look upon Tokai Teio, the racer who
stands above all others, and I long with every
fiber of my being to defeat her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heed my words, Monarch. The throne is yours for
now, for one day I shall return to reclaim it.
Prepare yourself for that day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ...I'll fight with all I got!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh... Well, it's time you head over there.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The whole crowd is cheering... and the cheers are
all for me!
choice_data_list: Show them what a winner looks like!
Show them what a winner looks like!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I am the Umamusume Monarch! The great Tokai
Teio!
